sections.title: A: Complete using the words in the box
sections.instructions: Complete the sentences using the words in the box.

items.sentence: Britain generally has very ...... winters. It never gets very cold.
It's ......! Do you think it might snow tonight?
Save the polar bears before they become ......!
A ...... problem is a problem that affects the whole world.
What kind of ...... animals live in the mountains round here?
There are several large forests in the ...... area.

sections.title: B: Word formation
sections.instructions: Complete by changing the form of the word in capitals.

items.sentence: They closed the airport because it was so ...... (FOG).
High winds can be very ...... (DESTROY).
Lots of ...... (NATURE) things are poisonous to humans.
Air ...... (POLLUTE) isn't really a serious problem where we live.
Isn't ...... (GARDEN) a bit of a boring hobby?
The submarine went down to a ...... (DEEP) of 200 metres.
The island isn't square – it's almost completely ...... (CIRCLE).
Is it ...... (DANGER) to swim in that lake?

sections.title: C: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
Not more than a thousand people live in the village. **most**
A thousand people ...... live in the village.

In the film, the car explodes and we don't know if Murray is alive or not. **up**
In the film, the car ...... and we don't know if Murray is alive or not.

There are lots of strange fish on the sea bed. **bottom**
There are lots of strange fish ...... the sea.

The fire stopped burning in the middle of the night. **out**
The fire ...... in the middle of the night.

Could you help me hang this 'DO NOT LITTER' sign? **up**
Could you help me ...... this 'DO NOT LITTER' sign?

We need to increase people's awareness about the environment. **build**
We need to ...... people's awareness about the environment.
I wish I ...... fly – I'd travel everywhere!
She wishes she ...... a better job.
I wish you ...... make so much noise!
He told ...... the news.
She gave ...... a present.
I wish I ...... gone to the concert – it sounds amazing.
He sent ...... an email yesterday.
She wishes she ...... harder at school.
They showed ...... around the lab.
I wish it ...... raining – I want to go out!
He bought ...... a birthday cake.
She asked ...... a question.
I wish I ...... more patient.
They lent ...... their car for the weekend.
She wishes she ...... the lottery last week.

sections.title: E: Complete the sentences
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: The forest is home to thousands of different ...... of animals.
Climate change is causing sea ...... to rise.
We should do more to protect ...... natural resources.
The earthquake measured 7.2 on the Richter ......
The volcano ...... and destroyed several villages.
Many animals are in danger of becoming ...... due to deforestation.
The river ...... its banks after the heavy rain.
Scientists believe the universe is about 14 ...... years old.
The solar ...... consists of eight planets orbiting the sun.
We need to reduce carbon ...... to fight climate change.
Protecting the environment is ...... for future generations.
The hurricane caused ...... damage to the coastal towns.
Rainforests are often called the ...... of the Earth.
Scientists have discovered a new ...... in the outer solar system.
The night sky was clear and we could see thousands of ...... .
